utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 7 items requested in the final format: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, total_budget. Still, it's included but arguably not fully specified), accommodation (hotel selection with costs—name and cost provided; though it's a hostel, acceptable), activities (selected activities with costs—names, descriptions, costs provided), additional_services (extra services with costs—restaurant dinner with cost provided), total_budget (complete cost breakdown—only a total €540 is given without breakdown aggregation; but individual costs are listed elsewhere, so total exists). The format asks for 'complete cost breakdown' which implies itemized; since only a single total field is given without breakdown inside it, this may be considered not fully specified. Counting fully specified: destination (1), travel_dates (2), accommodation (3), activities (4), additional_services (5). Transportation not fully specified, total_budget not fully specified. So 5 out of 7.
